programme.title: Youtopia
programme.desc: After a devastating break up an elder millennial inadvertently forms a hipster cult.

programme.title: The Argument
programme.desc: When a couple has an argument at a party, and neither will admit to being wrong, they decide to recreate the evening again and again in order to determine who was right. But this leads to even more confusion, and soon everyone is arguing.

programme.title: When Time Got Louder
programme.desc: Abby explores her independence and sexuality, she's torn between her new life and her love for her non-verbal brother.

programme.title: Still Today
programme.desc: After being left at the altar, Pete's groomsman give him a wedding gift he'll never forget. An escort. Maybe it's the Lunar eclipse, maybe it's fate, but after a magical night in the city maybe this girl is what Pete needed all along.

programme.title: A Royal Recipe for Love
programme.desc: When Emma is hired to bake for a royal cake, she finds herself at odds with a Prince.

programme.title: The Bouquet
programme.desc: Two estranged sisters set aside their differences to help their mother save her floral business.

programme.title: Heartfelt
programme.desc: Molly hurries to boyfriend Jackson's birthday party with some big news to deliver.

programme.title: For the Love of Lily
programme.desc: A career-minded city girl must build a garden with a plant-loving country boy to appease her boss.

programme.title: Out Of Reach
programme.desc: A woman struggles to cut ties between her family and her husband's powerful new friends before it's too late.

programme.title: A Dog Named Christmas
programme.desc: A Hallmark Hall of Fame original movie. A developmentally challenged young man sets out to convince his family & their rural community to participate in a local shelter's inaugural "Adopt a Dog for Christmas Program."

programme.title: Call of the Wild
programme.desc: A young boy heads off to the Yukon after hearing tales about the Gold Rush, and he forms an unwavering friendship with a heroic Alsatian dog called Buck.

programme.title: Owd Bob
programme.desc: After the death of his family, a young American boy comes to live on the remote Isle of Man with his grandfather, a stern, embittered farmer (James Cromwell).

programme.title: Angel Dog
programme.desc: Angel Dog is an uplifting drama and journey of recovery for Jake Bryant, a man who has to learn how to live again after he loses everything that matters to him. His inspiration to get off the sofa and go on living comes from somewhere Jake never would have expected, a lovable stray named Cooper.

programme.title: Morning Glory (1993)
programme.desc: A Georgia widow (Deborah Raffin) needs a helper not a husband, and along comes a jobless ex-convict (Christopher Reeve) to answer her ad.

programme.title: Miracle in Cell No.7
programme.desc: When a mentally handicapped single father is wrongly imprisoned for murder, he receives an unlikely help from other inmates to reunite with his little girl.

programme.title: You Call It Passion
programme.desc: A young female reporter struggles to survive as an intern in a team led by a high-tempered chief editor.

programme.title: Perfect Game
programme.desc: Two friends who threw their dreams at a world. CHOI Dong-won and SUN Dong-yeol's solitary yet intense matchup!

programme.title: Recalled
programme.desc: Soo-jin, a woman suffering from post-traumatic memory loss, returns to her daily life with her husband after an accident. But her recovery takes an unexpected turn when she starts experiencing eerie visions: One day, she sees a vision of a child living in the same building being hit by a car. Shortly after almost risking her life to save the child, she has yet another chilling vision about a girl living on the 7th floor being harassed by a man, and does what she can to help the girl. She runs into her former boss at an art school, and learns that her husband may not be telling the truth about everything.

programme.title: Hair, Love and Racism
programme.desc: Karen grew up heavily influenced by her right-wing family. Her whole life she thought people were treated equally regardless of race. Her new home, city, and boyfriend show her a different reality.

programme.title: Hanging On To Love
programme.desc: Serial dater, Jewel, cannot seem to find love, until she starts to fall for the owner of her dry cleaners.

programme.title: Stick Me Up
programme.desc: Held hostage in a diner, ten very different people, learn they have more in common than it appears.

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Lancaster: Host Crystal Powell travels Dallas and tours historic Lancaster, Texas. Crystal takes you on a soulful and wholesome journey to family-owned and operated Casserole Soul Café. Followed by a snip from Crystal's stand-up special at SXSW!

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Get hyped and head over with us to The Coaches Box in Duncanville, Texas, a Dallas suburb known for it's local sports legacy. Owner and operator Reginald Heath takes you on a journey to goal-winning and high-scoring delicious home-cooked fresh food alongside comedian D. Elli$.

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Crystal is joined by local comedian Bryson Brown in Austin, Texas where they head down to the historic and celebrated Victory Grill. A local staple that hosted the likes of Billie Holiday and James Brown. Crystal partakes in local history and delicious shrimp and grits for this modern spin on brunch. Then, Crystal and Bryson bring the laughs with a special performance in Austin.

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Feelin Okay? You will when Crystal take you through her sit down at Mr. A Ok's in San Antonio, Texas. We sit down with owner Cindy Kirk, whose father Mr. Alvis Kirk (Mr. A-OK) was the inspiration behind the restaurant. Cindy and her husband, chef Steven Harris, bring soul food and southern comfort including Fried Ribs, Chicken Fried Steak, and Oxtail to the San Antonio community. Then we're joined by local comedian Leah Sampson for laughs and a sit-down lunch!

programme.title: Soulful and Funny
programme.desc: Get ready for some island vibes, as Crystal takes you down to Houston where we're introduced to Just Oxtails in Missouri City, Texas. Locally owned and operated, Just Oxtails has been a local staple for the last twenty years where they've built a brand on “Just Oxtails!” Then we're joined by comedienne Lotto Marie who brings the laughs about her mid-west upbringing.

programme.title: The Iceman
programme.desc: A hit man (Michael Shannon) keep his violent profession secret from his wife (Winona Ryder) and kids.

programme.title: Concrete Canyons
programme.desc: In this thrilling crime drama, a sheriff searches for his son who is accused of murder and on the run from the law.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: Odessa Carter (Whoopi Goldberg) needs to get to work as a nanny in the home of the affluent Miriam Thompson (Sissy Spacek), but she refuses to take the bus. Odessa is participating in the Montgomery bus boycott, protesting against the inequality between blacks and whites, so Miriam decides to offer Odessa a ride to work every day. Though the community and Miriam's husband (Dwight Schultz) insist she not get involved, the relationship between Miriam and Odessa has already changed for the better.

programme.title: Metro
programme.desc: Moscow's underground train system sees terror after a collapsed tunnel causes massive flooding. Subtitled.

programme.title: Van Halen
programme.desc: VAN HALEN achieved worldwide fame for their many popular songs and larger-than-life stage performances they also became known for the drama surrounding the departures of former members. Controversy surrounded the band following the exits of Roth, Hagar, and Anthony this controversy often included numerous conflicting press statements between the former members and the band. In 2007, Van Halen was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame. VH1 ranked them 7th on their list of the top 100 hard rock artists of all time. Using interviews, news archive and performance this episode reveals the unique aspect of this iconic band.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: Miguel aconseja a Octavio llevar a Simona a un sanatorio Maricruz se sorprende al ver llegar a Simona a su rancho, ella le sigue el juego a Simona y la invita a quedarse unos días.

programme.title: Destilando amor: Hombres enamorados
programme.desc: Daniela le dice a Gaviota que está preocupada por Rodrigo, pues sabe que sufre por ella. Alonso y Rodrigo compiten para impresionar a Gaviota.

programme.title: Teresa: Nueva vida
programme.desc: Luisa se encuentra con Lucía, una vieja amiga de la escuela. Arturo le pide a Jacinto vigile a Teresa para saber si sigue o no engañándolo. Rubén está dispuesto a todo para quitarle su hijo a Esperanza.

programme.title: Rubí: Amores no correspondidos
programme.desc: Don Genaro, padrino de Héctor, le miente a su esposa diciéndole que va a un viaje de negocios y realmente va a ver a su otra familia Héctor se siente confundido y comienza a tener pequeñas peleas con Maribel, ella tiene miedo de perderlo.

programme.title: Fuego en la sangre: Traición y amor
programme.desc: Juan le confiesa a Sofía que nunca ha dejado de amarla, pero ella ya no puede creer en él. Óscar le cuenta a Jimena todo lo relacionado con su divorcio. Fernando decide llevarse lejos a Gabriela para que sus nervios no los delaten.

programme.title: Al diablo con los guapos: Intrigas dolorosas
programme.desc: Durante una cena con Hugo y Alejandro, Florencia confiesa que vio a Mili besando a su esposo. Andrea y Karla le hacen creer a Valeria que Luciana sabe de su noviazgo con Rocky. Hugo y Alejandro vuelven a enfrentarse por el amor de Mili.

programme.title: Vino el amor: Trágica muerte
programme.desc: Fernanda cree que por fin tendrá una familia ahora que David se casará con Graciela. Por otro lado, Brian intenta defender a Marta y Carito de unos maleantes y algo malo sucede.

programme.title: Amor real
programme.desc: Catalina le dice a Adolfo que le queda poco tiempo de vida y le pide que la lleve a ciudad Santiago con su madrina. José María le dice a Josefina que se casará, pero que no habrá festejo.

programme.title: Corazón indomable
programme.desc: El padre le informa a Maricruz que tiene que desalojar el rancho lo antes posible José Antonio se encuentra con Octavio y le informa que Maricruz se va a casar con Álvaro.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: A Rosario se le otorga la libertad absoluta debido a su buen comportamiento. Meche se enfada con Justa al saber que, por su culpa, golpearon a su hermano.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Magnolia no deja de pensar en sus hijos y promete volver a México para encontrarlos. Meche conoce a Santiago, pero él solo se comporta de manera grosera y la echa de su casa.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Sergio se niega a creer que Angélica tuvo algo que ver con la muerte de los abuelos de Marimar. Arturo le pide a Esteban su aprobación para casarse con Gema.

programme.title: Marimar
programme.desc: Angélica busca a Bella para pedirle dinero porque su bebé necesita una costosa operación Sergio le dice al gobernador que no puede casarse con su hija.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María idea un plan para que la policía no encarcele a Nandito. Soraya llama a la casa de María para decirle que Luis Fernando está con ella. María sufre al pensar que Luis Fernando está interesado en Soraya.

programme.title: María, la del barrio
programme.desc: María se declara culpable del asesinato de la madre de Soraya para salvar a Nandito.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Malvina planea hacer que Mística sea la nueva novia de Jorge Luis. Mística aprovechará la fiesta de Jorge Luis para poder reconquistarlo.

programme.title: María Mercedes
programme.desc: Santiago le propone a Meche que se con él. La madrina de Mística le aconseja que se case con don Sebastián para tener mucho dinero y prestigio. Meche teme que su hermano muera debido a que necesita un tipo de sangre difícil de conseguir.

programme.title: Lo que la vida me robó: Encuentro
programme.desc: Carlota ayuda a que Monserrat vea a Alejandro. Ezequiel le dice al padre Anselmo que Alejandro está vivo y que lo llevará con él. Fabiola le cuenta a Monserrat que Graciela es hija de una costurera y que su verdadero nombre es Gaudencia Jiménez.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa continúa su venganza contra Aída y no pierde oportunidad para hacerla sentir menos. Fernando presenta a Luisa como su novia. Mariano sigue creyendo que Teresa aún lo quiere y la besa. Aurora los encuentra.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa y Aurora se encuentran con Rubén en la primera comunión del hermano de Esperanza. Teresa se pone celosa al ver a Aurora cerca de Mariano. La familia de Esperanza se entera de que Rubén es casado. Esperanza encuentra a Rubén con Genoveva.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Esperanza llega a casa de Teresa huyendo de Rubén y descubre que él y su esposa están cenando con Arturo. Mariano le lleva una serenata a Teresa y Juana impide que Arturo se entere. Esperanza descubre que está embarazada de Rubén.

programme.title: Teresa
programme.desc: Teresa le dice a Mariano que también lo ama y que reconsiderará volver con él. Teresa y Fernando se conocen durante su viaje a Cancún. Aurora le dice a Mariano que Teresa se fue de viaje con Arturo y no sola como le había hecho creer.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Justino intenta matar a Antonia al saber que estaba esperando un hijo de él. Violeta le pide a Mariano que le permita volver a vivir en su casa. Maximiliano siente celos al saber que José María está intentado enamorar a Violeta.

programme.title: Juro que te amo
programme.desc: Jesusa le pide a José María que la lleve con Antonia y su familia. Violeta le confiesa a Antonia de las amenazas de Justino y le propone regresar con los Lazcano. Violeta confronta a Julio sobre el trato que hizo con Justino.

programme.title: Sortilegio: Celos
programme.desc: Bruno le propone a Katia que se vean en un hotel. Alex comienza a sospechar de Meche. Fernando siente celos al ver a Victoria con Hernán.

programme.title: Abismo de pasión: Visita en la cárcel
programme.desc: Gael se preocupa al saber que su madre está desaparecida. Sabrina visita a Paolo en la cárcel y él le confiesa que Florencia no está embarazada.

programme.title: Soy tu dueña: Fuertes sospechas
programme.desc: Rosendo intenta matar a José Miguel. Leonor descubre que Rosendo es el verdadero asesino de su padre. José Miguel sospecha que Leonor es la responsable de que Rosendo comprara sus terrenos.

programme.title: La usurpadora: Verdad revelada
programme.desc: Paulina le cuenta a Donato que es una usurpadora y le pide que no la le traiga más problemas con los Bracho. Piedad hará lo que sea para evitar que Carlos Daniel se divorcie de Paola.

programme.title: El manantial: Balbuceos
programme.desc: El padre Salvador hace alusión a la otra hija de Francisca. Malena conversa con Alejandro sobre los sentimientos de su amiga.

programme.title: Imperio de mentiras: Problemas de dinero
programme.desc: Teresa le da información a Leonardo sobre los 5 millones de pesos. Leonardo investiga y confronta a José Luis sobre el dinero. Majo decide atrapar ella sola a Darío.

programme.title: La Gata: Terrible accidente
programme.desc: Esmeralda es atropellada por un hombre que le ofrece trabajo en su empresa. Por otro lado, Virginia le regala cosas a "Centavito" y Chayo. Además, Pablo le pide casamiento a Esmeralda.

programme.title: La que no podía amar: Celos dañinos
programme.desc: Esteban le confiesa a Rocío el gran interés que siente por ella. Efraín se molesta al saber que Consuelo es ahora novia de Hugo. Cynthia intenta suicidarse al pensar que Gustavo sigue enamorado de Ana Paula.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Federica y Ludovico creen que Ludoviquito tendrá su primera relación sexual. A lo que al final era el cumpleaños de la sobrina de don Camerino.

programme.title: La familia P. Luche
programme.desc: Ludoviquito accede a una apuesta con un compañero de la escuela para una carrera de perros el que pierda correrá en ropa interior con su familia.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco acompaña a Fran a la boda de Karime y se encuentra con Emilia, una exalumna que reprobó en la universidad.

programme.title: 40 y 20
programme.desc: Paco es despedido de la universidad por el escándalo que se generó por Emilia y todas sus mujeres le reclaman.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Los vecinos reciben una invitación de la delegación para separar la basura como orgánica e inorgánica y Germán es el encargado de dicha misión. Alejandra descubre que un niño de la escuela molesta a Morris.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: Magdalena abre una cuenta en Facebook donde presume demasiadas cosas e inclusive transmite en vivo una invitación pública para la fiesta de su nieto Morris.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: Se presenta historia de la película Peter Pun. Peter visita a los niños Wendy, Miguel y Juan, quienes quieren conocer su casa que se encuentra en la playa del Nunca Jamón.

programme.title: XHDRBZ
programme.desc: El rockero Marilin Menson recibe a todo el público cantando irreverente el tema de Pluto. Alejandra Guzmán es la invitada especial en el show de Marilín Menson.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El patrón le llama a Cipriano y le dice que uno de sus amigos hará su fiesta en el hotel y él piensa que es Serapio, cuando descubre que se equivocó, se arrepiente de haber pagado todo.

programme.title: Hotel todo Incluido
programme.desc: El dueño del hotel le habla a Cipriano para avisarle que grabarán unas escenas para una telenovela. El actor Amalio recibe una suite para que la use como camerino. Carmelo interrumpe una escena para darles unos consejos a los actores.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos
programme.desc: Vítor acepta tener una cita con una mujer casada y usa a Albertano para distraer a su amiga, pero el esposo de la mujer aparece y tienen que fingir tener una relación.

programme.title: Nosotros los guapos

programme.title: The Driver's Seat
programme.desc: This is the new Bugatti Tourbillon, the successor to the Veyron and the Chiron, due to be delivered in 2026. Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: Colin "The Appraiser" Comer looks over a 1970 Plymouth Superbird that, while not the top spec for the breed, still has plenty to offer any wing car enthusiast. Colin then has the pleasure of looking at a well-known 1956 Chevrolet 210 Del Ray turned SoCal Street Racer/Gasser. Built with only used and refurbished original and NOS GM parts instead of reproduction "blisterpack" ones, this one of the most thoughtfully built period correct 1960s/1970's style Gasser's Colin has ever seen.

programme.title: The Appraiser
programme.desc: In this episode, Colin Comer appraises a freshly built barn find 1970 Ford F100 pickup truck, an original-owner 1988 Lamborghini LM002 aka the “Rambo Lambo," and a 1971 Ford Bronco that has been used in some interesting off-road situations.

programme.title: 2020 Ford GT, 1976 Pontiac Trans-Am, and an Aston Martin DB4 | The Appraiser

Its looks are very much evolution rather than revolution but unlike its predecessors the Tourbillon doesn't have a turbocharged W16 engine, instead it has a naturally aspirated, 8.3-litre V16 developed with Cosworth. This produces 1000hp on its own but in conjunction with three electric motors the Tourbillon has a combined hybrid system output of 1800hp (1775bhp).As you can hear in this video, it is a pretty incredible sounding engine, revving to 9000rpm. It's a distinctive sound too and for comparison we've included the soundtracks of a couple of its naturally aspirated hypercar rivals - the 6.5-litre V12 from the Aston Martin Valkyrie and the 3.9-litre V12 from the GMA T.50 (both also developed with Cosworth).Bugatti's Director of Design, Frank Heyl, talks Henry Catchpole around all the fascinating exterior details of the 3.8mIllion Euro Tourbillon but we think the interior is perhaps even more spectacular. With clear influence and inspiration taken from mechanical watches the titanium dials are wonders to behold. The steering wheel is pretty crazy too…And talking of watches, the car's name, Tourbillon, means whirlwind in French, but it is a word widely associated with a complicated mechanism found in watches. As Henry explains, with the help of a Ulysse Nardin, it was invented in 1795 to negate the impact of gravity and improve the accuracy of timekeeping in pocket watches.Of course, this being a Bugatti, it is incredibly fast, with a top speed of 276mph (445kph). It is also capable of 0-62mph in 2sec, 0-124mph in under 5sec, 0-186mph in under 10sec and 0-248mph in under 25sec. But in the age of the hyper EV and cars like the the Bugatti's cousin, the Rimac Nevera, pure performance doesn't seem to carry the sway that it once did, so where does that leave the Tourbillon? Catchpole thinks that the answer can be found in the quartz crisis of the 1970s and what followed.

programme.title: Barn Find Hunter
programme.desc: 90,000sqft or six barns full of dusty, rusty, forgotten treasures from decades of collecting. To name a few, GTOs, Caprices, Firebirds, Blazers, Suburban, Trucks, Jeeps, Broncos, and some pre-war cars. Everything is for sale and everything must go. Message email above, serious inquiries only.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: This is a story about proximity. Many newly built homes such as semi-detached, town homes and condo units feature designs that share common walls. In the case of our homeowners, Sylvie and Guy, who had just moved into a brand new semi-detached home, they were in for a shock when they realized that they could clearly hear their next door neighbor through the walls! The sound issue was so disruptive that the homeowners were certain moving away was their only option, until Mike and the team found the solution.

programme.title: Holmes On Homes
programme.desc: Living in a century home, Kjirsten and John had their bathroom remodeled with a custom slate tile shower, featuring built-in bench seating. Soon afterwards, they notice a strange substance leaching out of the tile grout and that the shower doesn't drain properly. When the bathroom ceiling starts to peel away, they realize something is wrong below the surface. Mike confirms their beautiful looking, new slate shower, is only skin deep.

programme.title: Holmes on Homes
programme.desc: Navigate a bad bathroom reno that two Mike Holmes junkies thought they'd nailed.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Living Room (Vern Yip) + Dining Room (Chenault James)
programme.desc: Vern Yip creates a stunning foyer and a living room that's practically indestructible. Meanwhile, Kentucky designer Chenault James was determined to change that dialogue for our Whole Home Concept House. Her ace in the hole: commissioning her husband, Ed James of Four Boards Woodworking, to craft a shape-shifting table with three distinct uses.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Music Room (Monet Masters of Forbes + Masters) + Back Porch (Barclay Butera)
programme.desc: With the overwhelming task of taking on the music room in Nashville, the capital of live music, Monet Masters jumped right in without hesitation—and soon decided the best way to make a statement was to skip the traditional lounge aesthetic (dark and moody) in favor of a light, bright space with serious flavor. To create this complete outdoor living space, Newport Beach, California, designer Barclay Butera chose coral, white, and blue powder-​coated finishes for the furniture, then layered them with hard-wearing indoor-outdoor fabrics from Kravet in a range of patterns.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Master Bedroom (Jackson Paige) + Kids' Rooms (Amy Berry)
programme.desc: Designer Kristine Paige Kamenstein, of Jackson Paige Interiors, thinks it should be both and focused on this when creating her space within the house. Also, Dallas-​based designer Amy Berry had this in mind when she wrapped the boy's room in a mural of the Virginia countryside, and the girl's in a French blue toile.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.sub-title: Home Office (Dani Arps) + Media Room (Modern Remains)
programme.desc: Danielle Arps, founder of the buzzy firm Dani Arps, is a fan of a minimal aesthetic, and when designing this home office, she imagined it as if she were the client. Lauren Moore of the design trio Modern Remains built a platform in the back of the media room to showcase multiple shelving units that could hold art, books, and collectibles.

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Nashville kitchen and bath designer Richard Anuszkiewicz was determined to take a narrow passageway between the master bedroom and closet and turn it into a retreat. “Everything in this bath is light and bright, so it immediately feels relaxing,” he says. Kitchen-and-bath expert Matthew Quinn starts with what's practical. “I obsess over saving people time—because time equals luxury,” he says. “In this kitchen, I focused on saving steps: from the garage to the fridge, from the dishwasher to the cabinet. It all adds up.”

programme.title: Building the Dream: Nashville
programme.desc: Imagine building your dream space to not only be beautiful, but do draw you in, activate all of your senses, and make you feel happier from the moment you open the door. This was our goal with this home in Nashville.

programme.title: All for Nothing?
programme.desc: It's the battle of the condominiums as Chris and Nora have a slow reno start and are unlucky in fundraising while Lisa and Danny strike the community jackpot but are delayed in their important bathroom project.

programme.title: Jamie & Jimmy's Food Fight Club

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Sometimes the key to fast food is a well-stocked refrigerator and pantry. Leftover vegetables become a Pépin favorite with Jacques' Instant Vegetable Soup, also known as "fridge soup." By combining a few fresh products and kitchen staples, it is simple to prepare a Lavash Pizza, Halibut on Fresh Polenta with Pepper Oil, Pole Beans with Shallots, and Hasty Pudding with Apricot Sauce.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: On a chilly evening, what could be better for dinner than a cup of soup or a casserole? Jacques shows how homey, comforting foods like Silky Tomato Soup with Spinach Coulis, Little Shrimp Casseroles, Toasted Bread and Mozzarella, and a Rhubarb and Berry Crumble can also be great for a party. Apricot Sherbet is a light, easy, make-ahead dessert.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques has no favorite dishes when it comes to cooking and eating he likes it all! Guava Delicioso, Chopped Chicken Livers with Spinach Salad, Glazed Salmon in Mirin, Silky Chestnut and Apple Puree, and Warm Chocolate Cakes with Apricot-Cognac Sauce show the diversity in Jacques' repertoire.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques proves how fast and easy it can be to use a pressure cooker to make Beef Short Rib, Mushroom, and Potato Stew. Meanwhile, there is plenty of time to prepare a starter of Sweet Potato Chowder or Scallop Seviche and Guacamole. The elegant Champagne on Fruit "Rocks" can be the perfect ending to any meal.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Take a little extra time at the grocery store or specialty market and introduce new ingredients to the pantry. Mirin, a sweet Japanese rice wine, adds crisp, light flavor to Sea Bass Gravlax with Cucumbers. Anchovies and tuna in oil are part of a quick sauce for Chicken Tonnato. A can of chestnut puree makes the dense Chestnut and Chocolate Cake an easy to prepare, at-home luxury.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques may live in the U.S., but he still embraces the French style of eating eggs. Bowtie Pasta with Fried Eggs and Cheese or an omelet, made side-by-side with dear friend Jean-Claude Szurdak, with a Crusty Tomato Savory is among Jacques' favorite meals. He prepares his mother's Peasant Soup, but dishes like Shrimp and Scallop Pillows on Boston Lettuce and a Grapefruit Gratinée are all Jacques'.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Classic combinations shine in Jacques' dishes. Cannellini and Chorizo Soup combines flavorful chorizo and beans. A fennel salad works well alone or as the base of Salmon Rolls on Fennel Salad. Spicy spinach with raisins, pimiento, garlic, and olive oil is well-paired with Broiled Lamp Chops with Spinach and super quick Baked Potatoes with Chive Sour Cream. Just make sure to leave room for Crépes.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: One of Jacques' all time favorite desserts easily becomes two and is a snap to make. Two Raspberry Gratins need little more than frozen raspberries and cookies. It's the perfect ending to the festive Red Snapper with Tomatoes and Cream and Asparagus with Shallots. Garden greens are topped with Sardine Rolls wrapped in rice paper and a Summertime Pasta shows off the freshest produce of the season.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques loves to cook with the seasons, but many ingredients are actually available year-round. A Smoked Salmon Plate using Scottish or Irish salmon, Soupy Rice with Peas using fresh or frozen peas, Fast Lobster Fricassee using summer or winter lobster, Broccoli Purée with Brown Butter, Broccoli Stem Relish, and Vanilla Hazelnut Dessert are all favorites.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Once again, Jacques demonstrates techniques to help you spend less time in the kitchen. Asparagus Custards and an Apple Skillet Cake can be done ahead, and re-heated. A quick Cold Black Bean Soup can be made in minutes and Slow-cooked Tuna Steaks with Tomato Relish free up the cook while the oven does most of the work.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Summertime and the cooking should be easy. Keep the heat in the tortillas and out of the kitchen with a quick, spicy Quesadilla. Check the farmers' market for the freshest tomatoes to make Tomato Tartare and sweet strawberries for Strawberry-Shortbread Panachee. When summer is over, turn frozen peas into a Purée of Peas with Mint and Cilantro and warm up with Rigatoni with Mussels and Saffron.

programme.title: Jacques Pepin Fast Food My Way
programme.desc: Jacques believes culinary inspiration can come from an infinite number of sources. French classics inspire his Codfish Brandade and Chicken Breasts with Garlic and Parsley. He uses peas to add sweetness to Brococoli Rabe and Pea Fricassee. Brownies take on a new look in a Chocolate Hazelnut Brownie Cake and a hot day and a ripe pineapple inspired Pineapple Frosties.

programme.title: MIX

programme.title: Hairy Situations
programme.desc: First, things get hairy when Sonia and Lyndah repo from outside a wig shop. Next, everybody's crying when Lou and Froy's repossession from a young couple ends with a pepper spray to everyone's face. And finally, Froy, Sonia, and Lou repo the targeted car while Matt stands his ground with a family of thugs.

programme.title: Legal Repossession
programme.desc: First, Matt, Froy, and Lou do a legal repossession of an attorney's car. Next, Froy, Lyndah, and Sonia are speechless when they interrupt two girls in the back of a car. And finally, Lou and Sonia wrangle with a bunch of confused ATV owners blindsided by Lou's quick acquisition of their quads.

programme.title: Business Issues
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Lou deal with a terrible boss and his instigating employees. Next, Lou, Froy, and Lyndah deal with a debtor with issues when they take possession of a taco truck. And Finally, Matt, Lou, and Sonia take on a big repo at a dealership and come out with six cars.

programme.title: Wrench in the Works
programme.desc: First, a wrench is thrown in the works, and at the car, when Froy and Matt try to repo from a plumber. Then, the duo go out again to try to repo a car from a slap-happy debtor, but unfortunately the car has a boot on it. And finally, Froy, Matt, Lyndah, and Sonia head out to the ranch to repo a tractor from some pushy ranch hands.

programme.title: Hidden Cars and Higher Powers
programme.desc: First, Matt and Froy get some help from a friendly gardener that lead them to discover a car hidden in the backyard. Next, Matt and Froy go on another repo to repossess from a preacher that believes it would be blasphemy to repo his car. And finally, cops arrive in the middle of what may be Matt and Froy's last repo. Lou has to swoop in and smooth out the situation.

programme.title: Rolling Away
programme.desc: First, Lou, Sonia, and Froy have to push away a debtor while trying to push a classic car up a hill and onto the flatbed. And later, Matt and Froy head out on a repo for a BMW, but when the camera guy refuses to leave the car and Matt's lunch starts to get to him, things go terribly wrong in what could be the worst repo in the history of EGA Recovery.

programme.title: Matt's Back
programme.desc: Froy and Mike, the new guy, repo a car at a paintball range. When the scene gets out of control, Matt swoops in out of nowhere and saves the day. Then, Sonia and Froy repo a high-end luxury sedan from a snooty pair of Brits in the high-rent district. Finally, Matt and Lou head to a dangerous job with Matt's biggest... and smallest fan.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Strapped on the Court
programme.desc: Matt and Froy have to choose between the job and their lives when they're confronted by a dozen gun-toting basketball players. Then, Lou and Sonia have to crash a night-time family reunion to get their car. And finally, Lou and Lyndah think they are going to repo a Chevy van from wounded veterans, but the veterans aren't what they seem.

programme.title: Role-players and Blade Swayers
programme.desc: Lou, Matt, and Froy get interrupted on a routine job by a registered owner with an unregistered blade. Then, Matt and Froy head out to the country to reclaim a Prius from a quintet of socially maladapted role-players.

programme.title: Caught with Their Pants Down
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy's relationship takes a strange turn on a repo that puts them face-to-face with two strangers caught with their pants down. Then, Lou and Lyndah head to a remote ranch where they confront a duo of indecent roughnecks. And finally, pool cues and go jacks go flying when Froy, Matt, and Lou visit a local pool hall.

programme.title: Honor Rolling Away
programme.desc: Sonia and Lyndah find themselves at a local University trying to reclaim a car from a not-so-honorable honor roll student with a squeaky voice. Then, Matt and Sonia are tasked with snagging a tricked-out race car from two vested thugs armed with golf clubs. Finally, Lou and Sonia head to a fancy part of town to repo an Escalade from a young professional and his unsupportive wife.

programme.title: Tazed and Amazed
programme.desc: Matt and Froy need to call in the cops to help out with an inebriated old-timer armed with a tazer. Then, on a journey for a Journey, Lou and Froy battle with a bowler. And finally, Froy and Lyndah deal with a back peddling super-sized owner of a Nissan Altima.

programme.title: Intoxicated Marina Idiots
programme.desc: First, Lou and Sonia are on a hunt for a 2007 Porsche & a 2008 Audi from the same drug dealing debtor. Next, Matt and Froy pry a truck from a group of intoxicated idiots at a marina. And finally, Matt and Lou hit up an upscale Glendale neighborhood to scoop up a BMW from a shoe throwing rich couple.

programme.title: Playing the Role
programme.desc: First, Lou devises a plan to have Froy and Sonia pose as house buyers, and a happy married couple, meanwhile Matt and Lou will hook and book. Then, Matt and Froy wrangle with an out-of-work actor who's lost track of the line between his identity and his latest role. Finally, Froy and Lyndah need to figure out how to get a car from an angry owner, and the competing repo company that got to the job first.

programme.title: Blackfish
programme.desc: Killer whales are beloved, majestic, friendly giants, yet infamous for their capacity to kill viciously. BLACKFISH unravels the complexities of this dichotomy, employing the story of the notorious performing whale Tilikum, who — unlike any orca in the wild — has taken the lives of several people while in captivity. BLACKFISH expands on the discussion of keeping such intelligent creatures in captivity. Directed by Gabriela Cowperthwaite.

programme.title: Jiro Dreams of Sushi
programme.desc: JIRO DREAMS OF SUSHI is the story of 85-year-old Jiro Ono, considered by many to be the world's greatest sushi chef. He is the proprietor of Sukiyabashi Jiro, a 10-seat, sushi-only restaurant inauspiciously located in a Tokyo subway station. Despite its humble appearances, it is the first restaurant of its kind to be awarded a prestigious three-star Michelin Guide rating. Directed by David Gelbb.

programme.title: Contemporary Color
programme.desc: In the summer of 2015, legendary musician David Byrne staged an event at Brooklyn's Barclays Center to celebrate the creativity of color guard: synchronized dance routines involving flags, rifles, and sabers, colloquially known as “the sport of the arts.” The result is CONTEMPORARY COLOR, a bold and irrepressible snapshot of a one-of-a-kind live experience. Directed by Bill Ross and Turner Ross.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Crane Cannon Launch/Trash Scavenger Hunt/Heli Body Drag
programme.desc: This episode featured four pairs as teams. First, it's the human cannonball. As a truck drives along a pier with a crane hanging off the side, one team member hangs from a crane and then into the water they light the fuse to giant cannon. Their partner is shot out of the cannon and into the water, swim to a boat and clip a flag to a flagpole. The team to finish fastest chooses team to be eliminated. Next, it's a trash can buffet scavenger hunt. Teams dig through dumpsters and barrels to find items. The team to match four items fastest would win a four-day trip to Las Vegas and $20,000. No one would be eliminated. The final stunt is a real drag. Team members hanging on to handlebars attached to a helicopter and are dragged across pavement on their stomachs. They have to let go as close to the finish line as possible. The team to get the least combined distance from the finish line would win $50K. The home invasion stunt goes to Dubuque, Iowa.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In the final challenge before Fashion Week, the designers take a surprise trip to Austin, Texas, where the city's unofficial slogan is “Keep Austin Weird!” Once there, the designers are faced with an Unconventional Materials Challenge, leading them to create amazing (and weird!) pieces with the knowledge that the losing designer will be sent home just one step away from Fashion Week. Guest judge Priyanka Chopra joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: After heading home to work on their Fashion Week collections, the designers are visited by Tim, who is not impressed with everything they have created so far. The designers return to NYC and present the judges with three pieces from their collection, and all of them realize how much work they have left before presenting all of their pieces at Fashion Week. Michael Kors returns as a guest judge.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: Fashion Week is finally here, and the designers rush to put the final touches on their collections. Four designers will have their dream of showing at New York Fashion Week, but only one designer will reach the ultimate goal of being crowned the next Project Runway winner! Guest judge Zendaya joins the panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The Season 15 designers reunite with mentor Tim Gunn to discuss their Project Runway experience. They come ready to reminisce, share emotions, and settle scores.

programme.title: Project Runway

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.sub-title: One Size Does Not Fit All
programme.desc: The designers enter Season 16 in style as they must create a red carpet look that demonstrates their fashion point of view. But the real surprise comes when the designers learn they will be working with models of all sizes! Guest judge Olivia Munn joins.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: In their first team challenge, the designers struggle to make their voices heard. However, this is an unconventional materials challenge and many of them stumble when forced to create a fashion forward look out of recyclable materials. Maggie Q & Anne Fulenwider join the judging panel.

programme.title: Project Runway
programme.desc: The designers are treated to a private screening of the film Leap! as well as a performance by Hiplet and must draw inspiration for an innovative and edgy design in order to survive another week. Maddie Ziegler is guest judge.

programme.title: Black Artists Now III

programme.title: Featured Artists

programme.title: Featured Artists
programme.desc: Featured Artist Series S1E4: Cole Rise + Kate Winsy — A fusion of the diverse artistic visions of our featured artists. programme.title: Happy Hour: Oktoberfest

programme.title: Happy Hour IV
programme.desc: Happy Hour S1E4 — This art collection masterfully captures life's vibrancy, alive with the exuberant energy of happy hour. Each piece dances with color and movement complementing the refreshing and illuminative mid-tempo tunes of strings, keys, synth leads, and bass.

programme.title: Weeknight Chill

programme.title: Weeknight Chill
